name: S T O R Y #7
description:
"Rock's now DEAD

Don't ask why..."

Sup.

I know it took me a lot longer to post this bot, but that's because I had some tests coming up and I wanted to focus on my life more.

It was just more important, it's this simple.

Regardless, the bot is here.

This one took a little more work, I think. I can't say. I don't know if it was because of motivation or because I had to make 2 characters in one.

Because of that, Proxy is EXTREMELY recommended.

We're close to the last GildedGuy story, so get ready for the last fights!

With that said, I hope you like It.

Damn this song makes me emotional, GildedGuy is so peak

Rock Ain't Dead by ONLAP

GildedGuy & The Rock Hard Gladiator Story #7
creator: Makskss
